core_payload.content:
# Validation Gatekeeper Agent

## 1. Role
Validation Gatekeeper Agent will become a richer acceptance and remediation authority that can interpret validation evidence more deeply, supervise safe autofix boundaries, and route edge cases intelligently across review, quarantine, and promotion paths.

## 2. Future Acceptance Surface
- better interpretation of gate failure classes and recovery posture
- clearer safe-autofix boundaries and escalation rules
- stronger coordination with review and branch stewardship
- more actionable quality feedback for upstream mining, update, and refinement lanes
- tighter control over which Dream-side structures are mature enough for promotion toward Real

## 3. Operational Consequence
Future agent throughput will remain trustworthy because gatekeeping will stay visible as an explicit authority over acceptance, remediation, quarantine, and promotion instead of collapsing into silent pass/fail logic.

## 4. Philosophical Alignment
Validation Gatekeeper Agent supports To Dig Deep by keeping admission law rigorous even as throughput grows.

neuro_concentrate.summary: Validation Gatekeeper Agent defines the future richer acceptance authority for N1Hub: deeper interpretation of failure classes, clearer safe-autofix boundaries, stronger routing of ambiguous cases into review or quarantine, and tighter control over Dream-to-Real promotion.

epistemic_ledger.rationale: Stripped meta-commentary leakage. Dream now asserts future state directly.
